overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city underpass at night. The player character moves steadily forward past purple vending machines and large digital billboards, with wet pavement reflecting the colorful artificial lighting. The footage is clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality cinematic rendering.

small white rectangular trash bin on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside glowing purple vending machines under a concrete overpass. The camera moves forward along the wet pavement, passing a white trash can while approaching a large support pillar. Neon signs from an adjacent street are visible to the left, and digital screens line the right wall ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with large digital billboard

events.description: large illuminated Cirrus Gold billboard becomes prominent on the right wall

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered corridor, approaching the large billboard on the right

notable_agents.action: person in pink jacket and white pants walking toward the camera on the right side

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement for Cirrus Gold covering the right wall with red and white graphics
smooth concrete building wall on the left side of the walkway
small street vendor stall with red neon lighting on the right side
tall illuminated pillar with advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered walkway, the massive Cirrus Gold billboard dominates the right wall with bright neon illumination. A pedestrian in a pink jacket walks toward the camera on the right side. The left side transitions to a smooth concrete wall as the vending machines recede behind.

events.description: camera approaches very close to the Cirrus Gold billboard, filling the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking close to the right wall billboard, approaching the end of the covered section

entered.detail: opening at the end of the covered walkway leading to a more open urban area with distant lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves very close to the massive Cirrus Gold billboard which now fills the right side of the frame with detailed advertising graphics. The walkway continues toward an exit visible in the distance, with the concrete wall passing by closely on the left. The wet pavement continues to reflect the neon lighting throughout the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a neon-lit underpass that transitions from a cluttered vending area into a corridor dominated by massive digital advertising. It begins beside glowing purple vending machines and a white trash can, moving along wet pavement that reflects the surrounding artificial light. As the camera advances past a large support pillar, the vending machines recede and the left side shifts to a smooth concrete wall while a pedestrian in a pink jacket approaches from the right. The scene then narrows as the camera draws closer to a towering Cirrus Gold billboard, which expands to fill the right side of the frame with detailed graphics. Finally, the movement continues deep into the corridor, guided by the reflective ground toward a distant exit.
